modules.module_title: Module 1: Introduction to Hair Removal & Client Consultation
Module 2: Waxing Techniques - Types of Wax & Application
Module 4: Body Areas & Specific Waxing Protocols
Module 6: Client Management, Business Ethics & Troubleshooting

questions.question: Hair removal ka sabse common method kya hai jo roots se hair ko remove karta hai?

options.B: Waxing

questions.explanation: Waxing ek process hai jismein hair ko roots se remove kiya jaata hai, jo shaving ya trimming se alag hai.

questions.question: Waxing session shuru karne se pehle client se kaun si information lena zaroori hai?

options.B: Unki skin type aur medical history

questions.explanation: Client ki skin type aur medical history jaanna bahut important hai taaki safe aur effective waxing ki ja sake aur kisi bhi contraindication se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Client consultation form ka kya purpose hota hai?

options.B: Client ki preferences aur health history record karna

questions.explanation: Consultation form client ki preferences, allergies, medical conditions aur previous waxing experience ko record karne mein help karta hai, jo personalized aur safe service provide karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Hair growth ke kitne main stages hote hain?

options.B: Do

questions.explanation: Hair growth ke teen main stages hote hain: Anagen (growth), Catagen (transition), aur Telogen (resting).

questions.question: Anagen stage mein hair kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Actively growing phase mein

questions.explanation: Anagen stage hair growth ka active phase hota hai, jismein hair follicles naye hair produce karte hain.

questions.question: Ek Waxing Technician ke liye hygiene kyun important hai?

options.B: Infections ko prevent karne aur client safety ke liye
options.C: Product ki life badhane ke liye
options.D: Salon ko saaf rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hygiene infections ko rokne aur client ki safety ensure karne ke liye paramount hai. Cross-contamination se bachne ke liye proper sanitation practices follow karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ki skin ko waxing se pehle kaise prepare karna chahiye?

options.B: Cleansing aur drying karke

questions.explanation: Waxing se pehle skin ko cleanse aur dry karna chahiye taaki oil, dirt aur lotions remove ho jaayen, jisse wax achhe se adhere ho sake.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin par rashes ya cuts hon, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Waxing ko postpone karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Rashes ya cuts wali skin par waxing karne se infection ya irritation badh sakta hai. Aise cases mein waxing ko postpone karna ya expert advice lena behtar hai.

questions.question: Client ki skin ko stretch karna kyun important hai jab wax apply karte hain?

options.A: Wax ko jaldi sukhane ke liye
options.B: Hair ko roots se better pull karne ke liye aur discomfort kam karne ke liye
options.C: Skin ko garam karne ke liye
options.D: Wax ko evenly spread karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Skin ko stretch karne se wax hair ko better grip karta hai aur pulling ke dauraan skin par khinchav kam hota hai, jisse pain aur irritation minimize hota hai.

questions.question: Hair removal ke liye laser treatment waxing se kaise alag hai?

options.A: Laser treatment zyada painful hota hai
options.B: Laser treatment hair growth ko permanently reduce karta hai, waxing temporary hai
options.C: Laser treatment sirf face par hota hai
options.D: Laser treatment mein koi pre-care nahi chahiye

questions.explanation: Laser treatment hair follicles ko target karke hair growth ko long-term ya permanently reduce karta hai, jabki waxing hair ko temporarily roots se nikalta hai.

questions.question: Good posture maintain karna ek technician ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Client ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Back pain aur fatigue se bachne ke liye
options.D: Salon ko professional dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Lambe samay tak kaam karte hue good posture maintain karna back pain, neck pain aur overall physical fatigue se bachne ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Client ki privacy maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Trust aur professional relationship banane ke liye
options.D: Taaaki koi client ki baatein na sun sake

questions.explanation: Client ki privacy ka samman karna unke trust ko build karta hai aur ek professional environment create karta hai.

questions.question: Hair growth direction mein wax apply karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaaki hair ko achhe se cover kiya ja sake
options.C: Waxing strip ko utarne mein aasani ho
options.D: Yeh koi standard practice nahi hai

questions.explanation: Hair growth ki direction mein wax apply karne se wax hair ko achhe se encapsulate karta hai, jisse roots se effective removal hoti hai.

questions.question: Hair removal se pehle skin par oil ya moisturizer laga ho toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Wax skin par achhe se stick nahi karega
options.D: Waxing ka result zyada smooth hoga

questions.explanation: Oil ya moisturizer wax ko skin par theek se adhere hone se rokte hain, jisse effective hair removal nahi ho paati.

questions.question: Contraindications ka kya matlab hai waxing ke context mein?

options.A: Woh conditions jinmein waxing karni chahiye
options.B: Woh conditions jinmein waxing nahi karni chahiye ya precautions leni chahiye
options.C: Waxing ke baad hone wale side effects

questions.explanation: Contraindications woh circumstances ya medical conditions hoti hain jinmein koi particular treatment (jaise waxing) nahi kiya jaana chahiye ya bahut savdhani se kiya jaana chahiye, kyuki isse client ko nuksaan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Client ki expectations ko manage karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taaaki client ko kam paise dene pade
options.B: Taaaki client ko future mein wapas aane se roka ja sake
options.C: Taaaki client ko realistic results ke baare mein pata ho aur woh satisfied rahe
options.D: Taaaki technician ko kam kaam karna pade

questions.explanation: Client ki expectations ko clearly discuss karna aur realistic results set karna unki satisfaction ke liye crucial hai. Isse misunderstandings aur disappointments se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Initial client consultation ke dauraan kaun sa question puchhna sabse zaroori hai?

options.A: Aapka favorite holiday destination kaun sa hai?
options.B: Kya aapko koi allergies hain ya aap koi medication le rahe hain?

questions.explanation: Allergies aur medications ke baare mein jaanna bahut important hai taaki kisi adverse reaction se bacha ja sake aur treatment safe rahe.

questions.question: Soft wax ko skin par apply karne ke baad kya use karte hain remove karne ke liye?

options.B: Ek spatula

questions.explanation: Soft wax ko skin par apply kiya jaata hai, fir uske upar fabric strip rakhi jaati hai aur fir us strip ko pull karke wax aur hair ko remove kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Hard wax ko remove karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Pani
options.C: Wax ko khud hi hard hone dena aur fir pull karna

questions.explanation: Hard wax ko skin par apply kiya jaata hai aur jab woh thoda thanda aur hard ho jaata hai, toh usko edges se pakad kar directly skin se pull kiya jaata hai, bina kisi strip ke.

questions.question: Sensitive areas jaise bikini line aur underarms ke liye kaun sa wax zyada suitable hai?

options.B: Hard wax

questions.explanation: Hard wax sensitive areas ke liye zyada suitable hota hai kyuki yeh sirf hair ko pakadta hai, skin ko nahi, jisse pain kam hota hai aur irritation bhi.

questions.question: Roll-on wax applicator ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Ye quick aur hygienic application provide karta hai
options.C: Ye sirf chote areas ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Roll-on wax cartridges wax ko evenly aur hygienically apply karne mein help karte hain, especially bade areas jaise legs par.

questions.question: Wax heater ka kya function hai?

options.B: Wax ko ek constant, workable temperature par maintain karna

questions.explanation: Wax heater wax ko melt karta hai aur usko ek ideal temperature par maintain karta hai taaki woh smooth aur effective application ke liye ready rahe.

questions.question: Wax ko apply karne se pehle skin par kya lagana chahiye taaki wax skin par kam stick ho?

options.B: Pre-wax oil ya powder

questions.explanation: Pre-wax oil ya powder skin aur wax ke beech ek barrier create karta hai, jisse wax sirf hair ko pakadta hai aur skin par kam pull hota hai, irritation kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Sugaring paste kis direction mein apply kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Hair growth ke opposite direction mein

questions.explanation: Sugaring paste hair growth ke opposite direction mein apply kiya jaata hai aur growth ki direction mein pull kiya jaata hai, jo waxing ke opposite hai. Isse ingrown hairs kam hote hain.

questions.question: Agar wax bahut garam ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Thanda hone ka wait karna chahiye
options.C: Usme thanda pani mila dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Bahut garam wax skin ko burn kar sakta hai. Hamesha wax ko apply karne se pehle uske temperature ko test karna chahiye aur thanda hone ka wait karna chahiye.

questions.question: Waxing strips ko kis direction mein pull karna chahiye?

options.B: Hair growth ke opposite direction mein

questions.explanation: Waxing strips ko hair growth ke opposite direction mein aur skin ke parallel (jaldi se) pull karne se hair roots se effectively nikalte hain aur pain kam hota hai.

questions.question: Spatula ko kitni baar wax pot mein dip karna chahiye?

options.B: Ek hi spatula ko baar baar

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination se bachne ke liye har application ke liye naya spatula use karna chahiye. Double-dipping strict no-no hai.

questions.question: Strip-less wax (hard wax) ka ek aur naam kya hai?

options.B: Hot wax

questions.explanation: Hard wax ko commonly hot wax bhi kaha jaata hai kyuki ye garam temperature par apply kiya jaata hai aur bina strip ke remove hota hai.

questions.question: Wax application ke liye hair ki ideal length kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Medium (0.5 cm se 1.5 cm)

questions.explanation: Hair ki ideal length 0.5 cm se 1.5 cm tak honi chahiye taaki wax unhe achhe se grip kar sake. Zyada chote hair pakad mein nahi aate aur zyada lambe hair painful ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Waxing ke liye single-use items ka use karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Hygiene maintain karne aur cross-contamination rokne ke liye
options.C: Client ko impress karne ke liye
options.D: Wax ki quality improve karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Single-use items jaise spatulas, gloves, aur strips ka use infections aur cross-contamination ko rokta hai, jo client safety ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Wax ko skin par thin layer mein apply karna kyun zaroori hai (soft wax ke liye)?

options.A: Taaaki wax jaldi khatam na ho
options.B: Taaaki wax strip achhe se stick ho aur hair effectively remove ho
options.C: Taaaki skin ko zyada garam na lage

questions.explanation: Soft wax ki thin layer application se wax strip achhe se adhere hoti hai aur hair ko effectively remove karti hai. Thick layer se strip theek se nahi chipakti aur wax unevenly remove hota hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko waxing ke dauraan bohot zyada pain ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Waxing rok deni chahiye aur client se consult karna chahiye
options.C: Zyada speed se wax karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Agar client ko excessive pain ho toh waxing ko rok dena chahiye, unki discomfort ka reason samajhna chahiye aur unke saath discuss karna chahiye ki aage kaise proceed karna hai.

questions.question: Waxing ke liye hair growth pattern ko samajhna kyun important hai?

options.A: Isse wax ki quantity kam lagti hai
options.B: Effective hair removal aur minimum discomfort ke liye
options.C: Taaaki client ko zyada time lage

questions.explanation: Hair growth pattern ko samajh kar uske opposite direction mein pull karne se hair roots se achhe se nikalte hain aur client ko kam pain hota hai.

questions.question: Pani mein soluble wax (water-soluble wax) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Ye skin se easily wash off ho jaata hai
options.C: Ye sirf sensitive skin ke liye hai
options.D: Ye bahut jaldi sukh jaata hai

questions.explanation: Water-soluble wax ka sabse bada fayda yeh hai ki leftover wax ko skin se pani se easily clean kiya ja sakta hai, jo convenience provide karta hai.

questions.question: Waxing se pehle skin ko cleanse karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaaki skin par se oil, dirt aur makeup hat jaye

questions.explanation: Cleansing se skin par se impurities remove ho jaati hain, jisse wax achhe se adhere hota hai aur infection ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Pre-waxing powder ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Extra oil aur moisture ko absorb karna

questions.explanation: Pre-waxing powder skin par se extra oil aur moisture ko absorb karta hai, jisse wax skin par nahi balki sirf hair par stick hota hai.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad skin par kya apply karna chahiye taaki soothe ho?

options.B: After-wax oil ya soothing gel

questions.explanation: After-wax oil ya soothing gel skin ko hydrate aur soothe karte hain, redness aur irritation ko kam karte hain, aur wax residue ko bhi remove karte hain.

questions.question: Ingrown hairs ko prevent karne ke liye client ko kya advise karna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly exfoliate karne aur moisturize karne ko

questions.explanation: Regular exfoliation dead skin cells ko remove karta hai jo hair follicles ko block kar sakte hain, aur moisturization skin ko soft rakhta hai, jisse ingrown hairs ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad skin ko direct sunlight exposure se bachana kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Sunburn aur hyperpigmentation ke risk ko kam karne ke liye
options.C: Wax ka effect kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Waxed skin bahut sensitive hoti hai aur direct sunlight exposure se sunburn aur hyperpigmentation ka risk badh jaata hai. Sunscreen ya protective clothing recommend karna chahiye.

questions.question: Waxing ke kitne ghante baad client ko garam pani se nahane ya swimming karne se bachna chahiye?

options.B: 2-3 ghante

questions.explanation: Waxing ke baad 24-48 ghante tak garam pani, swimming pools, saunas, aur steam rooms se bachna chahiye kyuki isse pores open ho sakte hain aur infection ka risk badh sakta hai.

questions.question: Post-waxing redness ko kam karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Garam compress lagana

questions.explanation: Thanda compress ya ice pack redness aur swelling ko kam karne mein help karta hai jo waxing ke baad ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad client ko tight kapde pehenne se kyun bachna chahiye?

options.B: Taaaki friction aur irritation se bacha ja sake
options.C: Taaaki wax ka effect na utre
options.D: Taaaki skin ko saans lene mein dikkat na ho

questions.explanation: Tight kapde waxed skin par friction create karte hain, jisse irritation, redness aur ingrown hairs ka risk badh jaata hai. Loose-fitting cotton kapde recommend kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Waxing ke kitne din baad exfoliation shuru karna safe hai?

options.B: 1-2 din baad

questions.explanation: Waxing ke 3-5 din baad exfoliation shuru karna safe hota hai, jab initial sensitivity kam ho jaati hai. Isse ingrown hairs prevent hote hain.

questions.question: After-wax soothing lotion mein kaun sa ingredient commonly use hota hai irritation kam karne ke liye?

options.B: Alcohol

questions.explanation: Aloe Vera apne soothing aur anti-inflammatory properties ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo waxed skin ko calm karne mein bahut effective hota hai.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad client ko gym jaane ya strenuous exercise karne se kyun bachna chahiye?

options.B: Excessive sweating aur friction se irritation ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Excessive sweating aur friction pores ko block kar sakte hain aur waxed skin ko irritate kar sakte hain, jisse bumps aur breakouts ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar wax residue skin par reh jaye toh use kaise remove karna chahiye?

options.B: Oil-based cleanser ya after-wax oil se

questions.explanation: Wax residues oil-soluble hote hain, isliye unhe after-wax oil ya oil-based cleanser se gently remove karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client ko waxing ke baad kitni der tak perfumes ya fragranced products use karne se bachna chahiye?

options.B: 24-48 ghante

questions.explanation: Fragrance aur alcohol-based products waxed skin ko irritate kar sakte hain, isliye 24-48 ghante tak unhe avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad skin par chote red bumps (folliculitis) kyun ho sakte hain?

options.B: Hair follicles irritate hone ki wajah se

questions.explanation: Folliculitis hair follicles ke irritation ya inflammation ki wajah se hota hai, jo waxing ke baad commonly hota hai. Proper aftercare se isse minimize kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Client ko waxing appointments ke beech hair ki growth ke liye kitna time dena chahiye?

options.B: 3-6 hafte

questions.explanation: Ideal waxing interval 3-6 hafte hota hai taaki hair ki length wax karne ke liye suitable ho aur saare hair growth cycles ko catch kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad skin ko moisturize karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Taaaki skin hydrated aur healthy rahe

questions.explanation: Moisturization skin ko hydrated rakhta hai, dryness aur flakiness ko prevent karta hai, aur skin barrier ko maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad skin par bruising se bachne ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Skin ko achhe se stretch karna aur wax ko quickly pull karna
options.C: Wax ko baar baar apply karna

questions.explanation: Bruising tab hota hai jab skin ko theek se stretch na kiya jaye ya wax ko dheere pull kiya jaye. Skin ko tight stretch karna aur wax ko ek hi jhatke mein quickly pull karna bruising ko minimize karta hai.

questions.question: Full legs wax karte samay wax ko kis direction mein apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Downwards

questions.explanation: Legs par hair growth generally downwards hoti hai, isliye wax ko hair growth ki direction mein (downwards) apply karna chahiye.

questions.question: Underarm waxing ke liye kaun sa wax zyada suitable hai?

options.B: Hard wax

questions.explanation: Underarms ek sensitive area hai jahan hair growth kai directions mein hoti hai. Hard wax skin ko kam pull karta hai aur effectively hair remove karta hai, making it ideal for this area.

questions.question: Bikini waxing ke liye client ko kis position mein comfortable karna chahiye?

options.B: Sidha let kar, ghutne mod kar aur pair bahar ki taraf khol kar

questions.explanation: Bikini waxing ke liye client ko sidha let kar, ghutne mod kar aur pair bahar ki taraf khol kar relax karna chahiye taaki technician ko access mil sake.

questions.question: Face waxing (jaise upper lip) karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Skin ko achhe se stretch karna aur chote sections mein kaam karna
options.D: Bade area par ek saath wax karna

questions.explanation: Face ki skin bahut delicate hoti hai. Skin ko achhe se stretch karna aur chote sections mein kaam karna irritation aur damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Eyebrow waxing ke liye kaun sa wax sabse best hai?

options.B: Hard wax

questions.explanation: Eyebrow waxing ke liye hard wax preferred hai kyuki ye precise application allow karta hai, sirf hair ko pakadta hai, aur delicate eye area par irritation kam karta hai.

questions.question: Full arms wax karte samay, kon se area par hair growth direction change ho sakti hai?

options.B: Elbow ke paas

questions.explanation: Elbow ke paas hair growth direction aksar change ho jaati hai, technician ko iska dhyaan rakhna chahiye aur wax ussi hisaab se apply karna chahiye.

questions.question: Back waxing karte samay client ko kis position mein hona chahiye?

options.B: Pet ke bal let kar

questions.explanation: Back waxing ke liye client ko pet ke bal let kar comfortable position mein hona chahiye taaki technician ko poori back par access mil sake.

questions.question: Men's chest waxing karte samay kya khaas dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Hair growth directions ki variety ho sakti hai aur skin sensitive ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Men ki chest par hair growth patterns complex ho sakte hain aur skin sensitive hoti hai. Multiple growth directions ke liye hard wax ya chote sections mein soft wax use karna behtar hota hai.

questions.question: Bikini waxing ke kitne types hote hain?

options.B: Do

questions.explanation: Bikini waxing ke kai types hote hain jaise Regular Bikini (sides), Full Bikini (thoda aur andar), aur Brazilian (almost saare hair remove karna).

questions.question: Upper lip wax karte samay client ko lips ko andar ki taraf tuck karne ko kyun bolte hain?

options.A: Taaaki wax lips par na lage
options.B: Taaaki skin achhe se stretch ho aur hair removal effective ho

questions.explanation: Lips ko andar ki taraf tuck karne se upper lip area ki skin tight ho jaati hai, jisse wax achhe se apply hota hai aur hair effectively remove hote hain, aur skin damage ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Chin waxing karte samay kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Hair growth direction varied ho sakti hai, chote sections mein kaam karna

questions.explanation: Chin par hair growth directions aksar irregular hoti hain, isliye chote sections mein kaam karna aur har section ki growth direction ko observe karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Full face waxing mein kaun kaun se areas cover hote hain?

options.B: Upper lip, chin, cheeks, sideburns, forehead

questions.explanation: Full face waxing mein generally upper lip, chin, cheeks, sideburns aur forehead jaise facial areas cover hote hain, excluding eyebrows agar alag se na mangi jaye.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin bahut loose hai (jaise underarms mein), toh waxing karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Skin ko bina stretch kiye wax karna
options.B: Skin ko achhe se stretch karna aur support dena

questions.explanation: Loose skin par bruising ya tearing ka risk hota hai. Skin ko achhe se stretch karna aur support dena bahut zaroori hai taaki wax effectively remove ho aur skin ko nuksaan na ho.

questions.question: Leg waxing ke dauraan client ko kis position mein rakhna chahiye taaki technician ko poore leg par access mil sake?

options.B: Sidha let kar, fir side mein mud kar, aur fir pet ke bal

questions.explanation: Poore leg ko effectively wax karne ke liye client ko alag-alag positions mein adjust karna padta hai, jaise sidha let kar front, side mein mud kar inner/outer thighs, aur pet ke bal let kar back.

questions.question: Bikini waxing se pehle client ko kya preparation karne ko kehna chahiye?

options.B: Area ko clean aur dry rakhne ko, aur hair ko trim karne ko agar bahut lambe hain

questions.explanation: Client ko area clean aur dry rakhne ko bolna chahiye. Agar hair bahut lambe hain (2 cm se zyada), toh unhe trim karne ko kehna chahiye taaki waxing kam painful aur effective ho.

questions.question: Agar client ko previously ingrown hairs ki problem rahi ho, toh eyebrow waxing ke liye kaun sa method prefer karna chahiye?

options.B: Waxing (hard wax)

questions.explanation: Threading ek excellent alternative hai un clients ke liye jinko ingrown hairs ki problem hoti hai. Ye hair ko roots se nikalta hai bina skin ko zyada irritate kiye.

questions.question: Back waxing karte samay, spine ke paas ke area par kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Skin ko achhe se stretch karna aur chote sections mein kaam karna

questions.explanation: Spine ke paas ki skin sensitive ho sakti hai aur uneven bhi. Skin ko achhe se stretch karna aur chote, manageable sections mein kaam karna safest approach hai.

questions.question: Salon mein instruments ko sterilize karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Saare microorganisms ko destroy karna

questions.explanation: Sterilization ek process hai jismein saare microbial life forms (bacteria, viruses, fungi, spores) ko destroy kiya jaata hai, jo infection control ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Disinfection kya hai?

options.B: Harmful microorganisms ko kam karna ya destroy karna

questions.explanation: Disinfection ek process hai jismein most harmful microorganisms ko destroy ya inactivate kiya jaata hai, lekin spores ko nahi. Ye sterilization se kam effective hai.

questions.question: Double-dipping ka kya matlab hai aur ye kyun avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Wax ko do baar garam karna
options.B: Ek hi spatula ko baar baar wax pot mein dip karna, jisse cross-contamination ho sakti hai
options.D: Client ko do baar wax karna

questions.explanation: Double-dipping ka matlab hai ek hi spatula ko client ki skin par apply karne ke baad wapas wax pot mein dalna. Isse bacteria aur skin cells wax pot mein transfer ho sakte hain, jisse cross-contamination ka risk badhta hai.

questions.question: Waxing karte samay gloves pehenna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Technician aur client dono ko infection se bachane ke liye
options.C: Taaaki wax haathon par na lage

questions.explanation: Gloves pehenna technician aur client dono ko cross-contamination aur bloodborne pathogens se bachane ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko diabetes ho toh waxing karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Skin ko zyada pull karna
options.C: Unki skin zyada fragile aur healing slow ho sakti hai, isliye extra care leni chahiye

questions.explanation: Diabetic clients ki skin zyada fragile hoti hai aur unki healing process slow hoti hai, jisse infection ka risk badh jaata hai. Extra gentle approach aur careful inspection zaroori hai.

questions.question: Retin-A ya Retinol use karne wale client ki skin par waxing karna safe hai?

options.B: Nahi, isse skin lift ho sakti hai
options.C: Sirf soft wax use karna chahiye
options.D: Sirf hard wax use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Retin-A ya Retinol jaise products skin ko patla aur sensitive bana dete hain. Aise skin par waxing karne se skin lift ya tearing ho sakti hai. Waxing avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad skin par rashes ya bumps hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Client ko soothing products aur proper aftercare suggest karna chahiye, aur agar severe ho toh doctor se consult karne ko kehna chahiye

questions.explanation: Rashes ya bumps common hain. Soothing products aur aftercare tips help karte hain. Agar condition bigadti hai, toh medical advice lena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Kya pregnant ladies ki waxing karna safe hai?

options.B: Generally safe hai, lekin unki skin zyada sensitive ho sakti hai aur pain tolerance kam ho sakti hai
options.D: Sirf first trimester mein safe hai

questions.explanation: Pregnancy ke dauraan hormonal changes ki wajah se skin zyada sensitive ho sakti hai aur pain tolerance kam ho sakti hai. Extra care aur gentle techniques use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko varicose veins hon toh kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Un areas par wax nahi karna chahiye
options.B: Sirf soft wax use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Varicose veins wale areas par waxing avoid karni chahiye kyuki isse veins par pressure pad sakta hai aur damage ho sakta hai. Alternative hair removal methods suggest karne chahiye.

questions.question: Sunburn wali skin par waxing karna kaisa hai?

options.B: Nahi karna chahiye kyuki isse skin damage aur pain badh sakta hai
options.D: Waxing se sunburn theek ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Sunburn wali skin already damaged aur sensitive hoti hai. Waxing karne se pain, blisters aur further skin damage ho sakta hai. Waxing ko tab tak postpone karna chahiye jab tak skin poori tarah theek na ho jaye.

questions.question: Salon mein towels ko kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Clean aur dry jagah par, dust se door

questions.explanation: Clean towels ko dust-free, dry aur enclosed cabinet mein store karna chahiye taaki woh hygienic rahen aur contamination se bache rahen.

questions.question: Agar client ko skin infection (jaise fungal infection) ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Infection par wax laga dena chahiye
options.B: Waxing service deny karni chahiye aur unhe doctor se consult karne ko kehna chahiye
options.C: Sirf us area ko avoid karna chahiye
options.D: Waxing service jaldi se kar deni chahiye

questions.explanation: Skin infection wale clients ko waxing service deny karni chahiye taaki infection spread na ho aur client ki health ko nuksaan na ho. Unhe medical advice lene ki salaah deni chahiye.

questions.question: Bloodborne pathogens ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Blood ke through failne wale infection-causing microorganisms

questions.explanation: Bloodborne pathogens woh microorganisms hote hain jo infected blood aur body fluids ke through transmit ho sakte hain, jaise Hepatitis B, C aur HIV.

questions.question: Waxing room mein proper ventilation kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Chemical fumes ko remove karne aur fresh air circulation ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation chemical fumes aur wax ki smell ko remove karta hai, aur room mein fresh air maintain karta hai, jo client aur technician dono ke liye healthier environment provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko moles ya skin tags hon toh kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Unpar direct wax laga dena chahiye
options.B: Un areas ko avoid karna chahiye ya unke aas-paas bahut careful rehna chahiye

questions.explanation: Moles ya skin tags par direct waxing karne se unhe damage ho sakta hai ya unmein irritation ho sakti hai. Unhe avoid karna ya unke aas-paas bahut savdhani se kaam karna chahiye.

questions.question: Waxing ke dauraan accidents (jaise wax girna) hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant saaf karna chahiye aur proper safety protocols follow karne chahiye
options.C: Client ko saaf karne ko bolna chahiye

questions.explanation: Spills aur accidents ko turant saaf karna chahiye taaki slips aur falls se bacha ja sake aur hygiene maintain rahe. Proper clean-up procedures follow karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ko appointment reminder bhejna kyun important hai?

options.B: No-shows kam karne aur client retention badhane ke liye
options.C: Taaaki unhe zyada call karna pade

questions.explanation: Appointment reminders clients ko unki booking yaad dilate hain, jisse no-shows kam hote hain aur salon ki efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek professional Waxing Technician mein kaun si quality honi chahiye?

options.B: Good communication skills aur empathy

questions.explanation: Good communication skills aur empathy clients ko comfortable feel karati hain aur unke concerns ko samajhne mein help karti hain, jo client satisfaction ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko waxing ke baad ingrown hair ki problem ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unhe exfoliation aur proper moisturization ki advice deni chahiye
options.C: Unhe shaving karne ko bolna chahiye
options.D: Unhe fir se wax karne ko bolna chahiye

questions.explanation: Ingrown hairs ko prevent aur treat karne ke liye gentle exfoliation aur regular moisturization bahut effective hote hain. Client ko sahi products aur techniques ke baare mein inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client feedback lena kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Services ko improve karne aur client satisfaction ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Taaaki client ko busy rakha ja sake
options.D: Negative comments ko ignore karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client feedback valuable insights provide karta hai jisse services ko improve kiya ja sakta hai aur client satisfaction badhti hai, jo business growth ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Agar client waxing ke dauraan bahut nervous ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unse baat karni chahiye, unhe reassure karna chahiye aur process explain karna chahiye
options.C: Unhe chup rehne ko bolna chahiye
options.D: Zyada speed se kaam karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Nervous clients ko calm karne ke liye unse gently baat karni chahiye, process ko step-by-step explain karna chahiye, aur unhe reassure karna chahiye ki woh safe hands mein hain.

questions.question: Waxing services ki pricing decide karte samay kya factors consider karne chahiye?

options.B: Product cost, technician's skill, salon overheads aur market rates

questions.explanation: Pricing mein product cost, technician ki expertise, salon ke kharche (rent, utilities), aur competitive market rates jaise sabhi factors ko consider karna chahiye taaki business profitable rahe aur client ko fair price mile.

questions.question: Client loyality programs ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Client ko kam aane ke liye motivate karna
options.B: Repeat business ko encourage karna aur client retention badhana
options.C: Sirf naye clients ko attract karna

questions.explanation: Loyalty programs jaise discounts ya free services repeat business ko encourage karte hain aur clients ko salon ke saath jude rehne ke liye motivate karte hain.

questions.question: Agar client waxing ke baad skin irritation ki complaint kare toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unki baat sunni chahiye, aftercare advice deni chahiye aur future mein precautions discuss karni chahiye
options.C: Unhe wapas na aane ko bolna chahiye

questions.explanation: Client ki complaints ko seriously lena chahiye. Unki problem ko samajhna, aftercare tips dena aur future mein precautions discuss karna trust build karta hai aur problem solve karta hai.

questions.question: Professional ethics mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Honesty, integrity, confidentiality aur client welfare

questions.explanation: Professional ethics mein honesty, integrity, client ki confidentiality maintain karna, aur unke welfare ko prioritize karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko waxing ke baad skin lifting ho jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant thanda compress lagana chahiye, antiseptic apply karna chahiye aur medical advice ke liye suggest karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Skin lifting ek serious complication hai. Turant thanda compress lagana, antiseptic apply karna aur client ko doctor se consult karne ki salaah dena bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ko waxing ke benefits ke baare mein inform karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaaki woh informed decision le saken aur service ki value samajh saken
options.C: Taaaki woh technician se impress hon

questions.explanation: Benefits jaise smoother skin, finer hair regrowth, aur long-lasting results ke baare mein inform karne se client informed decision le paate hain aur service ki value ko appreciate karte hain.

questions.question: Product knowledge ek technician ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Client ko sahi products recommend karne aur unke questions ka answer dene ke liye
options.C: Taaaki woh expensive products bech saken

questions.explanation: Product knowledge technician ko client ki skin type aur concerns ke hisaab se sahi pre-wax aur post-wax products recommend karne mein help karta hai, aur unke questions ka confidently answer de paata hai.

questions.question: Agar client waxing ke dauraan discomfort express kare toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Process ko temporarily rokna chahiye, unki discomfort ka reason puchhna chahiye aur adjust karna chahiye
options.C: Zyada speed se kaam karna chahiye
options.D: Unhe chup rehne ko bolna chahiye

questions.explanation: Client ki discomfort ko acknowledge karna aur us par action lena professional conduct ka hissa hai. Process ko rok kar unki problem samajhna aur adjustments karna client comfort ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon mein customer service ka kya role hai?

options.B: Client satisfaction, loyalty aur salon ki reputation build karna
options.C: Sirf naye clients ko attract karna

questions.explanation: Excellent customer service client satisfaction ko badhata hai, unki loyalty ko encourage karta hai aur salon ki positive reputation banane mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Waxing technician ko apni skills ko update karte rehna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taaaki woh zyada fees charge kar saken
options.B: Industry trends aur naye techniques se update rehne aur better service provide karne ke liye
options.C: Taaaki unhe naye products khareedne pade

questions.explanation: Beauty industry hamesha evolve hoti rehti hai. Skills ko update rakhne se technician latest trends, products aur techniques se aware rehta hai, jisse woh high-quality service provide kar pata hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko waxing ke baad severe allergic reaction ho jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant medical help seekhne ko bolna chahiye aur emergency services ko call karna chahiye agar zaroori ho
options.C: Unhe koi bhi cream laga deni chahiye

questions.explanation: Severe allergic reaction ek medical emergency ho sakti hai. Turant medical help seekhne ko bolna chahiye aur agar situation serious ho toh emergency services ko call karna chahiye.
